return(function(...)local q=d(F)local c=function(c,b,U,S,j)return e(V,{c;b;U;S;j},F,q)end return c end,{},function(V,F)local q=d(F)local c=function(c)return e(V,{c},F,q)end return c end,{},function(V,F)local q=d(F)local c=function(c,b,U,S,j,k,g)return e(V,{c,b;U;S;j,k;g},F,q)end return c end,function(V,F)local q=d(F)local c=function()return e(V,{},F,q)end return c end,function(V,F)local q=d(F)local c=function(c,b,U)return e(V,{c;b;U},F,q)end return c end,function()N=1520551775%6388873+N g[N]=1699967933%15043964 return N end,function(V)local F,e=-71304+71305,V[-282212-(-282213)]while e do g[e],F=g[e]-(-548521-(-548522)),1687336127%8565158+F if-917419-(-917419)==g[e]then g[e],k[e]=nil,nil end e=V[F]end end,function(V)g[V]=g[V]-(452459644-477633)%2035955 if-554081-(-554081)==g[V]then g[V],k[V]=nil,nil end end return(J(15040455-(-910300),{}))(q(j))end)({...},setmetatable,unpack or table[F((871812-191930)+(-1438136-(-756988)))],getmetatable,newproxy,select,getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV)end)(...)
